title: SetResponse.updated/not_updated/not_destroyed lack complementary doc comment
description: After adding '/// Keys are caller-supplied creation keys' to created and not_created, the updated/not_updated/not_destroyed fields have no comment. A reader seeing the pattern on created will wonder if updated is also caller-keyed — it is NOT (those keys are server Ids per RFC 8620 §5.3). Add '/// Keys are server-assigned object Ids; see RFC 8620 §5.3.' to updated, not_updated, not_destroyed.
close_reason: Fixed: added 'Keys are server-assigned object Ids; see RFC 8620 §5.3.' to updated, not_updated, not_destroyed fields.
